generated_oml:
// C3: Physical sensing components
instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Occupancy sensor located within the LEED Platinum building, instrumented and mapped in the BIM model."
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance IlluminanceSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Illuminance sensor installed in the lobby and learning spaces, attached to the BIM asset."
    DTDFVocab:producedData IlluminanceDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Temperature sensor installed in HVAC return and supply ducts, linked to the BIM model."
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance HumiditySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Humidity sensor positioned near critical equipment racks, integrated into the BIM schema."
    DTDFVocab:producedData HumidityDataTransmitted
]

instance CO2Sensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "CO₂ sensor installed in occupied zones, mapped in the BIM environment."
    DTDFVocab:producedData CO2DataTransmitted
]

// C2: Acting Components
instance LightingActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Lighting luminaires throughout the building that receive control commands via Ditto."
]

instance HVACActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "HVAC actuators controlling setpoints for temperature and ventilation, managed through Ditto."
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction
instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "JSON telemetry payload of occupancy sensor published via MQTT to the Eclipse Hono broker."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance IlluminanceDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "JSON telemetry payload of illuminance sensor published via MQTT to the Eclipse Hono broker."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IlluminanceSensor
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "JSON telemetry payload of temperature sensor published via MQTT to the Eclipse Hono broker."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
]

instance HumidityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "JSON telemetry payload of humidity sensor published via MQTT to the Eclipse Hono broker."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HumiditySensor
]

instance CO2DataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "JSON telemetry payload of CO₂ sensor published via MQTT to the Eclipse Hono broker."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CO2Sensor
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeMonitoringDashboard : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real‑time monitoring dashboard displaying occupancy‑based energy usage and environmental conditions."
    DTDFVocab:provides OccupancyBasedEnergyUsageReport
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics service generating HVAC maintenance alerts based on sensor trends."
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictiveMaintenanceAlertAction
]

instance RLLightingControlOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Reinforcement‑learning service optimizing lighting controls to reduce energy consumption."
    DTDFVocab:provides LightingOptimizationRecommendation
]

instance PerformanceSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Performance simulation service evaluating energy models and building response to control strategies."
    DTDFVocab:provides PerformanceSimulationInsight
]

instance Immersive3DVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Immersive 3D visualization service rendering building models in Unreal Engine 5."
    DTDFVocab:provides ThreeDVisualizationAction
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance IFCBIMSchema : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Base IFC BIM schema transformed into Ditto thing twins for the building."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseDittoThingTwinManager
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelDrivenEngineeringToolSuite
]

instance OccupancyData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Occupancy data record stored in the Eclipse Hono broker as JSON payload."
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHonoBroker
]

instance IlluminanceData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Illuminance data record stored in the Eclipse Hono broker as JSON payload."
    DTDFVocab:fromData IlluminanceDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHonoBroker
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Temperature data record stored in the Eclipse Hono broker as JSON payload."
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHonoBroker
]

instance HumidityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Humidity data record stored in the Eclipse Hono broker as JSON payload."
    DTDFVocab:fromData HumidityDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHonoBroker
]

instance CO2Data : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "CO₂ data record stored in the Eclipse Hono broker as JSON payload."
    DTDFVocab:fromData CO2DataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHonoBroker
]

// C11: Enablers
instance EclipseHonoBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono MQTT broker facilitating real‑time telemetry ingestion."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringDashboard, PredictiveAnalyticsService, RLLightingControlOptimizationService, PerformanceSimulationService, Immersive3DVisualizationService
]

instance EclipseDittoThingTwinManager : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Ditto thing twin manager converting incoming JSON data into twin representations."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringDashboard, PredictiveAnalyticsService, RLLightingControlOptimizationService, PerformanceSimulationService, Immersive3DVisualizationService
]

instance ModelDrivenEngineeringToolSuite : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model‑Driven Engineering tools for automatic transformation of IFC BIM models into Ditto twins."
]

instance BIMAuthoringToolSuite : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "BIM authoring tools (e.g., Autodesk Revit) used to enrich device metadata and control semantics."
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance OccupancyBasedEnergyUsageReport : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Report detailing occupancy‑based energy consumption patterns within the building."
]

instance LightingOptimizationRecommendation : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Recommendation generated by RL lighting control for optimal energy savings."
]

instance PerformanceSimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight from performance simulation evaluating HVAC and lighting models."
]

instance PredictiveMaintenanceAlertAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic alert for predicted HVAC component failures based on sensor trends."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ThreeDVisualizationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D visualization of the building model in Unreal Engine 5."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands generated by the DT (e.g., lighting dimming, HVAC set‑point adjustment) are published to Ditto thing twins, then forwarded over MQTT to building PLCs/actuators, serving as the source of actuated actions."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Whole‑building twin operates in real‑time with sub‑second latency; control loops run at a 1 Hz update rate with typical MQTT latency below 100 ms."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestrated system where enriched BIM models are converted into Ditto thing twins; twins communicate via Hono MQTT broker; visualization nodes (Unreal Engine) consume twin state; control logic modules exchange state via Ditto."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Twin spans all lifecycle phases: design (ideal BIM model), construction (manufactured building validated against BIM), and operation (runtime with live sensor data and control)."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity assessed by the Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric; validity ensured through IFC metamodel validation, runtime consistency checks, and synchronization monitoring."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT-based communication via Eclipse Hono with TLS encryption; Ditto exposes HTTP/REST endpoints and WebSocket streams; mapping between MQTT topics (e.g., /sensor/+/data) and Ditto thing twins."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Hosted on a cloud‑based middleware stack (Hono & Ditto) deployed on Kubernetes; visualization server (Unreal Engine) runs on a GPU‑enabled workstation; all components orchestrated via Docker containers."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Integration with external BIM workflows, IoT device registries, and other service platforms via REST APIs; partner systems consume Ditto thing data for cross‑building analytics."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Compliance with IFC BIM standards (Industry Foundation Classes), Open Protocols of Eclipse Hono (MQTT, AMQP) and Ditto (JSON, REST), adherence to ISO 14001 for environmental reporting, and Model‑Driven Engineering best practices."
]
